'''Aruden Kej''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] which threatened to tear the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] apart in the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] being, Aruden Kej was inducted into the ranks of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Over time, Kej attained the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. As a Knight of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Kej continued his studies of the Jedi Path, choosing to pursue the way of the [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]]. Becoming an [[Jedi ace|ace pilot]] within the Order's [[Jedi Starfighter Corps|starfighter corps]], Kej was a well respected Jedi.<ref name="HNN49" />

Active during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Kej was assigned to a strike force sent to deal with the [[Iridium Pirates/Legends|Pirates of Iridium]] which were harrying the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]]. Under the leadership of Masters [[Belsed-Qan Idan]] and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]], Kej piloted a [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 interceptor]] amongst the Republic diplomatic fleet, hoping to encourage a non-violent solution.

However, as the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|Republic cruiser]] the ''[[Monitor III]]'' moved into the sector, the fleet was attacked by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. Engaging the Pirates' [[2 Warpod|warpod]] pinnaces, [[Longprow attack cruiser]]s, and [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] starfighters, Kej and five other Jedi were able to beat back the marauders and saved the ''Monitor III'' from utter destruction. While the pirates were defeated in the end, Kej was killed in a dogfight with a Z-95 Headhunter while making an attack run on the Longprow cruisers.<ref name="HNN49" />
